markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the content partnership decision.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Decision Pending:** SpecterOps’ decision hinges on securing product team review bandwidth. Meshach Cisero will meet with leaders Luke and Bryce tomorrow to get a final answer.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Review Bottleneck:** The primary blocker is the time required from the product team (PMMs), who are outside Meshach's direct management.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Quality Feedback:** Content is technically accurate, but the tone can be inconsistent. The proposed fix is to feed GrowthX's AI more SpecterOps-owned content.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** GrowthX offered to reduce review time by using custom "artifacts"—summaries of client documents (like a white paper)—to automatically guide the AI's content generation, ensuring accuracy from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### SpecterOps' Internal Blocker

  - [The partnership decision is paused pending a final meeting between Meshach Cisero, Luke, and Bryce tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To confirm if the product team has the necessary bandwidth for content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Challenge:** The product team is outside Meshach's direct management, requiring coordination to align priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Goal:** Provide a definitive answer to GrowthX by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

### Content Quality & Proposed Fix

  - [**Positive:** Content is consistently technically accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Area for Improvement:** The tone can be inconsistent.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Proposed Fix:** Feed GrowthX's AI more SpecterOps-owned content (e.g., white papers, style guides) to better align the output with the brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

### GrowthX's Process & Solution

  - [GrowthX's AI pipeline uses "artifacts" to guide content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Example:** A SpecterOps white paper was summarized into a custom artifact, which the AI now references to ensure accuracy on topics like "identities at rest."](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Benefit:** This process reduces review time by embedding client-specific knowledge directly into the draft, requiring no developer support.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Suggestion:** Highlight product-specific sections in drafts to further streamline PMM reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Meshach Cisero:** Meet with Luke and Bryce tomorrow to finalize the decision on product team review bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Meshach Cisero:** Deliver SpecterOps' final decision to GrowthX by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/sxvuo8FJso3Y9hib6e1sz7P32R4zjyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
